app.title: LLM Tycoon
app.subtitle: Staff up your autonomous engineering studio

create.name: Name
create.workspacePathHint: Leave blank to use the default.

recommendAgents.title: AI team recommendation
recommendAgents.intro: Describe the project and we'll suggest a starter team.

recommend.title: AI recommended team
recommend.intro: Describe the project and Claude suggests a starter team.
recommend.ctaHint: Suggests agents that fit the description you entered.
recommend.tooShort: Please add more detail. At least {min} characters (currently {current}).

aria.unlocked: Keep this role across the next recommendation

newProjectWizard.empty: No recommendations yet. Add a project description above.

describe.label: Project description
describe.placeholder: e.g., Payment module hardening — PCI audit + token encryption
describe.hint: Describe scope and goals. Recommendations update as you type.
describe.tooShort: Please add more detail. At least {min} characters (currently {current}).

aria.unlocked: Keep this role across the next recommendation

errors.DEPENDENCY_MISSING: A required adapter dependency is missing.

locale.title: Choose your language
locale.body: You can switch anytime from the settings. The interface and Claude recommendations follow your choice.

mcp.title: Pick an MCP transport
mcp.body: Use stdio for local tools and streamable HTTP for remote services. You can change it per project later.

recommend.title: Get a team recommended
recommend.body: Describe your project — Claude suggests a starter team. Here's a preview:
recommend.demoDescription: Payment module hardening — PCI audit + token encryption

tokens.title: Watch your token budget
tokens.body: The top indicator shows input, output, and cache-hit tokens. Auto-compaction toasts keep you informed.

header.offlineBadgeTooltip: Pending requests will retry once you're back online.

failure.title: Automation failed
failure.emptyStderrFallback: stderr is empty — likely no changes to commit.
failure.spawnFailure: Failed to launch the git binary.
failure.fallbackMessage: Automation reported a failure but no diagnostic output was captured.

settings.title: Threshold settings
settings.intro: When the cumulative total (input + output tokens) or the rough cost (USD) crosses either threshold, the top badge switches to that severity color. Empty means "unset".
settings.saveError: Save failed — browser storage is full or unavailable. Try again or use a different browser.

signup.title: Create account
signup.oauthHint: Sign up with your {provider} account. The account is created automatically on first sign-in.

errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.usernamePattern: Username may contain only letters, digits, and ._-
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordCharset: Password must include both letters and digits.

gitCredentials.intro: Personal access tokens are stored on the server only and never kept in browser storage (localStorage). After saving they appear only as a mask ({mask}).
gitCredentials.tokenMaskTitle: Saved tokens are not returned in plaintext
gitCredentials.tokenPlaceholderReplace: Enter a new token to replace the saved one

errors.missingFields: Please enter both username and token

sharedGoal.title: Shared goal
sharedGoal.intro: The shared goal that the leader agent will distribute to teammates. Auto-development can begin only after the goal is saved.
sharedGoal.loadingDescription: One moment please. A saved goal will be prefilled if found.
sharedGoal.loadErrorTitle: Failed to load the shared goal
sharedGoal.loadErrorDescription: Try again later or check your network.
sharedGoal.noProjectDescription: Once a project is selected, the shared-goal form appears here.
sharedGoal.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Token validation, AES encryption, PCI audit logs — describe the context (20+ chars) for the leader to distribute.

errors.readOnlyBlocked: Session tokens are exhausted; saving is paused. Restore the subscription and retry.

log.readOnlyBlocked: Save of shared goal blocked — session tokens exhausted
